queries: Where to get PRP for hair loss Katy Texas
action.query: Where to get PRP for hair loss Katy Texas

content.text:
If you're seeking Platelet-Rich Plasma (PRP) therapy for hair loss in Katy, Texas, here are several reputable clinics offering this treatment:

**[Integrative Primary Care](http://www.integrativeprimarycare.net/?utm_source=openai)**  
**Closed · Internist · 4.7 (158 reviews)**  
_225 Bella Katy Dr, Katy, TX 77494_  
Dr. Syed Farhat Zaidi provides PRP therapy to address cosmetic concerns, including hair loss. The clinic is located at 225 Bella Katy Dr, Katy, TX 77494. For appointments, call 832-500-7585.

**[Arhez Wellness](https://www.arhezwellness.com/?utm_source=openai)**  
**Open now · Medical spa · 5.0 (41 reviews)**  
_23960 Katy Fwy Suite 320, Katy, TX 77494_  
Dr. Makkani specializes in personalized PRP therapy treatments for hair restoration. The clinic is situated at 23960 Katy Fwy, Suite 320, Katy, TX 77494. Contact them at 346-355-5999.

**[Ageless Med Spa](https://www.agelessmedspakaty.com/?utm_source=openai)**  
**Closed · Medical spa · 4.5 (117 reviews)**  
_414 W Grand Pkwy S #115, Katy, TX 77494_  
Offers noninvasive PRP therapy for hair restoration. Located at 414 W Grand Pkwy S., #115, Katy, TX 77494. To schedule an appointment, call 281-392-3700.

**[Aesthetic Master Infusions LLC](http://aestheticmasterinfusions.com/?utm_source=openai)**  
**Closed · Medical spa · 5.0 (51 reviews)**  
_5231 E 5th St, Katy, TX 77493_  
Provides PRP treatments for hair restoration, facial rejuvenation, and joint pain management. Contact them at 832-301-0013 to schedule a consultation.

**[Luminous MediSpa](http://www.luminousmedispa.com/?utm_source=openai)**  
**Open now · Medical spa · 5.0 (134 reviews)**  
_410 W Grand Pkwy S #310, Katy, TX 77494_  
Offers PRP Hair Restoration treatments designed to rejuvenate and stimulate hair growth. Located at 410 W Grand Pkwy S # Suite 310, Katy, TX 77494. For appointments, call 281-665-3666.

**[Rich & Rooted Medspa](https://richandrootedmedspa.com/?utm_source=openai)**  
**Open now · Medical spa · 4.8 (17 reviews)**  
_24022 Cinco Village Center Blvd Suite 120 2A, Park Row, TX 77494_  
Provides PRP treatments for skin rejuvenation and hair restoration. Located at 24022 Cinco Village Center Blvd Suite 120 Unit 2, Katy, TX 77494. Contact them at 832-427-9872.

Before proceeding with PRP therapy, it's advisable to consult with a healthcare professional to determine the most suitable treatment plan for your specific needs.
